CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/ROBERT PETERSON AS COUNSEL. DEF. MERIAM MEDINA PRESENT & IN PRO PER. DE- FAULTS HAVE PREVIOUSLY ENTERD AS TO SANDRA & BLANCA MEDINA. PROVE-UP TAKEN AS TO GERALDO MEDINA ZAMORA - PL. WIT, VIR- GINIA WRIGHT S&E & PL. EXH.#1, 3-DAY NOTICE, MARKED FOR ID & MOVED INTO EVID. - JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREM- ISES AT 383 RAYMOND AVE, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMED- IATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 1-8-93 - $1,250 DEPOSIT RETAINED BY PL - $2,100 RENT & DAMAGES - NO FURTHER STAYS DEF. WARRANTS THERE ARE NO OTHER TENANTS - PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED - EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & ATTY FEES - DEF. MUST RETURN KEYS UPON VACATING & RECEIVE RECEIPT FOR KEYS FROM PL. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZAMORA, GERALDO MEDINA MEDINA, MYRIAM MEDINA, SANDRA MEDINA, BLANCA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 383 RAYMOND AVE, S.F, CA. $3,350.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,350.00, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT INCLUDES DEFAULT OF GERALDO MEDINA ZAMORA.
